text: my roommate loads the dishwasher like a raccoon organizing trash
got a cvs receipt so long i used it as a scarf. not even joking its december
the fire alarm is basically my kitchen timer at this point
found a battery from 2009 in my junk drawer. it still works???
i buy oat milk but cant afford oats. this is the lifestyle
someone on my flight clipped their toenails. i watched a man lose his soul in 12B
put a fork in the garbage disposal and now i hear it in my dreams
my cubicle light flickers every day at 3pm. im not saying ghosts but ghosts
this ramen has notes of msg and regret with a sodium finish
set off the smoke detector making toast. my neighbors think im dead
why does the middle seat person get NOTHING. not even the armrest??
my junk drawer has three remotes and none of them go to anything i own
spent $7 on a latte but wont pay $1.99 for an app. im aware of the irony
the dishwasher is NOT a place for wooden spoons karen
my cvs receipt is longer than my will to live
i fear the garbage disposal more than any horror movie
accidentally made actual flames trying to cook an egg. just an egg
found my retainer from 8th grade in the junk drawer. class of 06 baby
my toaster has one setting: arson
guy next to me on the plane took his shoes off before takeoff. before. takeoff.
i arrange my instant ramen by flavor profile and im not ashamed
the office microwave smells like betrayal and fish
u dont know fear until a spoon falls into the running disposal
my dishwasher loading technique is a art form and my wife disagrees
bought a $12 candle bc self care but ate cereal for dinner
cvs gave me 4 feet of coupons for buying one chapstick
i keep every takeout menu in my junk drawer like a dragon hoards gold
the fire alarm went off and my cat didnt even flinch. shes used to it
someone reclined into my laptop screen on a 45 min flight
my blender sounds like its trying to escape and honestly same
found a blockbuster card in the junk drawer. poured one out
the shin ramyun with an egg is basically fine dining dont @ me
i will never put my hand in the disposal even if its off. never
my coworker microwaves fish every single friday. every. single. one.
loading a dishwasher is the #1 cause of divorce and i have proof
treat yourself they said. so i bought fancy ramen. the $2 kind
my receipt from walgreens could wallpaper a bathroom
the smoke alarm is just my cooking applause at this point
whoever invented the middle seat owes me an apology and a drink
my washing machine walks across the floor during spin cycle. its alive
found 47 rubber bands in the junk drawer. fourty seven
my fridge makes a noise at 2am that sounds like a demon clearing its throat
burned water once. dont ask me how bc i dont know either
the disposal ate my wedding ring and i had to fish it out crying
fancy salt is $14 and regular salt is $1. im buying the fancy one tho
my cubicle neighbor hums the same song every day. i dont know the song
if u load plates facing the wrong way we cant be friends sorry
the cvs cashier apologized for the receipt length. even she knows
my junk drawer is a time capsule i never meant to make
splurged on avocado toast and cried at my bank app after
the person in 14C brought a whole rotisserie chicken on the plane
maruchan creamy chicken is S tier and i will die on this hill
my microwave has a popcorn button that burns popcorn every time
i deep cleaned my junk drawer and found $4.37 in coins. big day
opened the oven and my eyebrows said goodbye
the garbage disposal sound when it catches a fork haunts me
im convinced the office printer is haunted it only jams for me
my flight neighbor fell asleep on my shoulder. we are not close sir
the dishwasher pods go in the DOOR not loose in the bottom dad
i have 87 cvs extrabucks and no idea how to use them
cooked bacon shirtless. war has fewer casualties
uber eats delivery fee is $8 but walking is free. ordering uber eats tho
found a nokia phone in my junk drawer. battery still at 68%
my dryer eats exactly one sock per load. where do they go
added truffle oil to my cup noodles. elevated dining experience
my roommate puts knives blade up in the dishwasher. psychopath behavior
the fridge at work has stuff from employees who quit 2 years ago
i use the garbage disposal with my eyes closed bc what if
made pasta and the pot boiled over onto the burner. fire dept came again
boarding group 7 is just airline code for u dont matter
my junk drawer has 11 pens and none of them work
i print my cvs receipts on purpose now. for the aesthetic
bought a $40 face mask but eat 50 cent ramen. balance
the office bathroom is the only place i find peace and im not sorry
samyang 2x spicy changed my life and also my stomach lining
my toaster oven caught fire and i just watched it for a sec. like oh
someone at work labeled their lunch DO NOT EAT. so i ate it
the disposal made a grinding noise and i just... walked away
found a key in the junk drawer. no idea what it opens. keeping it forever
if u recline ur seat on a short flight u are a villain. full stop
my dishwasher doesnt dry anything. its just a wet dish storage unit
the cvs receipt doubles as gift wrap in december. resourceful queen
spent $6 on sparkling water but wont turn on the heat. priorities
my keurig made a noise like it was dying today. same keurig same
found a gameboy color in the junk drawer with pokemon red still in it
my neighbor cooks at midnight and the whole floor smells like garlic
i put a pan in the dishwasher once and my mom called from 3 states away
set off the fire alarm boiling water. the water wasnt even hot yet
lemon pepper ramen with a soft egg is my love language
the airplane bathroom is where dignity goes to die
my disposal sounds like its chewing gravel and honestly mood
bought a vitamix but only use it for smoothies that are 90% ice
my junk drawer has instruction manuals for things i threw away in 2014
the break room microwave has seen things no appliance should see
my smoke detector chirps at 3am like a passive aggressive bird
found a coupon in my junk drawer. expired 2017. felt something tho
my receipt from target was so long the cashier rolled her eyes printing it
the guy in 8A is doing a full skincare routine on the plane rn
i consider dryer sheets a luxury item now. adulthood is wild
the freezer ice buildup has its own ecosystem at this point
